Alice is the lead.\",\n  extract=True,\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n","language":"python"}]

31:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"degrade_episodic"}]
32:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the tiered degradation cycle that compresses old episodic memories."}]
33:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"degrade_episodic(dry_run: bool = False) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
34:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns a dict with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tier1_to_tier2"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tier2_to_tier3"}]," counts. Called automatically during ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}],". Configure via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS"}],", and tier weight env vars. (v2.3)"]}]
35:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"get_contaminated"}]
36:["$","p",null,{"children":"Surface non-stated memories for audit and review."}]
37:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"get_contaminated(limit: int = 50, min_importance: float = 0.0) -> list[dict]\n","language":"python"}]
38:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns episodic memories where veracity is NOT ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"stated\""}],": everything inferred, tool-generated, imported, or unknown. Sorted by importance descending. Use for periodic cleanup of AI-inferred memories. (v2.3)"]}]
39:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"enable_streaming"}]
3a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Enable event streaming for this memory instance. Wires the stream into BeamMemory so all write operations emit events."}]
3b:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"enable_streaming() -> Mnemosyne\n","language":"python"}]
3c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Call once after construction to activate the streaming subsystem. Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"self"}]," for chaining."]}]
3d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"compress"}]
3e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Compress memory content using dictionary, RLE, or semantic strategies."}]
3f:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"compress(\n  content: str,\n  method: str = \"auto\",\n) -> tuple[str, CompressionStats]\n","language":"python"}]
40:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"The memory content to compress"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"method"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"auto\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Compression method: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"dict\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"rle\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"semantic\""}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"auto\""}]," (tries dict first, falls back to RLE)"]}]]}]]}]]}]
41:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns a tuple of ",["$","code",null,{"children":"(compressed_content, CompressionStats)"}],". ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CompressionStats"}]," includes ",["$","code",null,{"children":"original_size"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"compressed_size"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ratio"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"method"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"savings_percent"}],"."]}]
42:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"decompress"}]

44:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"decompress(\n  content: str,\n  method: str = \"dict\",\n) -> str\n","language":"python"}]
45:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"compress_memories"}]

47:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"compress_memories(\n  memories: list,\n  method: str = \"auto\",\n) -> tuple[list, CompressionStats]\n","language":"python"}]
48:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns a tuple of ",["$","code",null,{"children":"(compressed_memories, aggregate_stats)"}],". Each memory in the list is a dict with at least a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"content\""}]," key. Compressed memories get ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_compressed"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_compression_method"}]," metadata keys."]}]
49:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"detect_patterns"}]
4a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Detect patterns across all working + episodic memories (or a provided list)."}]
4b:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"detect_patterns(memories: list | None = None) -> list[DetectedPattern]\n","language":"python"}]
4c:["$","p",null,{"children":["If ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memories"}]," is ",["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}],", uses all valid working + episodic memories. Returns a list of ",["$","code",null,{"children":"DetectedPattern"}]," objects, each with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pattern_type"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"temporal\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"content\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"sequence\""}],"), ",["$","code",null,{"children":"description"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"samples"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata"}],"."]}]
4d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"summarize_patterns"}]

4f:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"summarize_patterns(memories: list | None = None) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
50:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns a dict with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"total_memories"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"patterns_found"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_patterns"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content_patterns"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sequence_patterns"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"top_pattern"}],"."]}]
51:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"get_all_memories"}]
52:["$","p",null,{"children":"Return all working + episodic rows for analysis."}]
53:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"get_all_memories() -> list[dict]\n","language":"python"}]
54:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns all valid, non-superseded, non-expired memories across working and episodic tiers, scoped to the current session and global memories. Useful as input to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_patterns()"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summarize_patterns()"}],"."]}]
55:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"sync_to"}]
56:["$","p",null,{"children":"Compute a delta for a peer — returns changes since the last sync checkpoint."}]
57:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"sync_to(\n  peer_id: str,\n  table: str = \"working_memory\",\n) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
58:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{peer_id, table, delta, count}"}],". The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"delta"}]," is a list of memory dicts that have changed since the last sync."]}]
59:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"sync_from"}]
5a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Apply a delta received from a peer."}]
5b:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"sync_from(\n  peer_id: str,\n  delta: list,\n  table: str = \"working_memory\",\n) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
5c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{peer_id, table, stats, checkpoint}"}]," with import statistics and an updated sync checkpoint."]}]
5d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"V2 Properties"}]
5e:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance exposes several v2 subsystems as lazy-initialized properties:"]}]
5f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Property"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"stream"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Thread-safe event stream with push (",["$","code",null,{"children":"on"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any"}]," callbacks) and pull (",["$","code",null,{"children":"listen"}]," iterator) patterns for real-time memory notifications"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compressor"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryCompressor"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Dictionary-based, RLE, and semantic compression strategies for reducing memory footprint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detects temporal (hour/weekday), content (keyword frequency, co-occurrence), and sequence patterns across memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"delta_sync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Incremental synchronization between Mnemosyne instances with checkpointed resume support"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"plugins"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"PluginManager"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Discovers and manages plugins from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],". Built-in: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"LoggingPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MetricsPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FilterPlugin"}]]}]]}]]}]]}]
60:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Access the stream for real-time notifications\nmem.stream.on(EventType.MEMORY_ADDED, lambda event: print(f\"New memory: {event}\"))\n\n# Listen to stream as an iterator\nfor event in mem.stream.listen():\n  print(f\"Event: {event.event_type.name} - {event.memory_id}\")\n\n# Detect patterns across stored memories\npatterns = mem.detect_patterns()\n\n# Or get a summary\nsummary = mem.summarize_patterns()\n\n# Incremental sync to a peer\ndelta = mem.sync_to(peer_id=\"remote-1\")\n\n# Apply a sync from a peer\nresult = mem.sync_from(peer_id=\"remote-1\", delta=received_delta)\n","language":"python"}]
61:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"MemoryStream API"}]
62:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stream"}]," property exposes a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]," with these methods:"]}]
63:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on(event_type: EventType, callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Register a callback for a specific event type"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any(callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Register a callback for all event types"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off(event_type: EventType, callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Remove a specific callback"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off_any"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off_any(callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Remove an any-event callback"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"emit"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"emit(event: MemoryEvent)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Emit an event to all callbacks and iterators"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"listen"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"listen(event_types=None) -> Iterator[MemoryEvent]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Return an iterator that yields events as they occur"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_buffer"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_buffer(event_types=None, since=None) -> list[MemoryEvent]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get buffered events, optionally filtered"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"clear_buffer"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"clear_buffer()"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Clear the event buffer"}]]}]]}]]}]
64:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"DeltaSync API"}]
65:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"delta_sync"}]," property exposes a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]," with these methods:"]}]
66:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_checkpoint"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_checkpoint(peer_id) -> Optional[SyncCheckpoint]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get the last sync checkpoint for a peer"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"set_checkpoint"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"set_checkpoint(peer_id, checkpoint)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Set the sync checkpoint for a peer"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compute_delta"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compute_delta(peer_id, table='working_memory') -> list[dict]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compute changes since last sync"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"apply_delta"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"apply_delta(peer_id, delta, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Apply a received delta"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_to"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_to(peer_id, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compute and checkpoint a delta (convenience)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_from"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_from(peer_id, delta, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Apply and checkpoint a delta (convenience)"}]]}]]}]]}]
67:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"PatternDetector API"}]

69:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_temporal"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_temporal(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect hour-of-day and day-of-week patterns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_content"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_content(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect frequent keywords and co-occurrence"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_sequence"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_sequence(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect source-based sequence patterns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_all"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_all(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run all detectors, sorted by confidence"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"summarize_patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"summarize_patterns(memories) -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Human-readable summary of all patterns"}]]}]]}]]}]
6a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scratchpad"}]

81:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"input_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Path to the export file"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"force"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"bool"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["If ",["$","code",null,{"children":"True"}],", overwrite existing entries on conflict"]}]]}]]}]]}]
82:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns a dict with import statistics (",["$","code",null,{"children":"beam"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"legacy"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}],")."]}]
83:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"TripleStore Class"}]
84:["$","p",null,{"children":"A separate class for managing structured subject-predicate-object triples (temporal knowledge graph)."}]
85:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import TripleStore\n\nts = TripleStore()\n","language":"python"}]
86:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"add"}]
87:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"add(\n  subject: str,\n  predicate: str,\n  object: str,\n  valid_from: str | None = None,\n  source: str = \"inferred\",\n  confidence: float = 1.0,\n) -> int\n","language":"python"}]
88:["$","p",null,{"children":"Adds a triple and returns its ID. Auto-invalidates previous triples with the same (subject, predicate) pair."}]
89:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"query"}]
8a:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"query(\n  subject: str | None = None,\n  predicate: str | None = None,\n  object: str | None = None,\n  as_of: str | None = None,\n) -> list[dict]\n","language":"python"}]
8b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Query triples by any combination of subject, predicate, or object. Pass ",["$","code",null,{"children":"as_of"}]," for temporal point-in-time queries."]}]
8c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"export_all / import_all"}]

8e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Bulk export and import of triples."}]
8f:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Module-Level Convenience Functions"}]
90:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne provides module-level functions that operate on a default instance:"}]
91:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import remember, recall, get_context, get_stats\nfrom mnemosyne import forget, update, sleep, sleep_all_sessions\nfrom mnemosyne import scratchpad_write, scratchpad_read, scratchpad_clear\n\n# These are equivalent to using Mnemosyne() with session_id=\"default\"\nremember(\"Some important fact\")\nresults = recall(\"important fact\")\n","language":"python"}]
92:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Plugin Tools"}]
93:["$","p",null,{"children":"When using Mnemosyne as a Hermes plugin, the following tools are exposed:"}]
94:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tool"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Store a new memory with optional entity/fact extraction"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_recall"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hybrid
